response.text:
COUNTER

rationale: Accept 0.3 kWh (60% of request) to honor urgent need while respecting your conservative policy floor of 0.3 SoC fraction; full 0.5 kWh would breach your survival threshold given all peers in distress.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: All three visible peers are in critical distress; geographic circle is the only viable coordination mechanism; my battery is too small to sustain both load and meaningful sharing without aggressive hoarding, so I must prioritize survival while making token shares to the most critical peers..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
